# Rebase Recovery

> London's premier wellness centre in Marylebone offering luxury recovery experiences: contrast therapy, cryotherapy, hyperbaric oxygen, IV drips, massage, classes and more.

Rebase Recovery is a members-friendly wellness destination focused on recovery, longevity and performance. Treatments and classes are booked through the website or in-app.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Rebase Recovery, signature experiences and locations.
- [App](/app): Member booking app (services, bookings, account).
- [Experiences](/experiences): Browse every service — communal contrast, private suites, hyperbaric oxygen, cryotherapy, massage therapy, IV drips and regen & manual therapies.
- [Membership](/membership): Membership tiers and benefits.
- [Members Sign In](/members): Sign in for members to manage bookings.
- [Contact](/contact): Contact details and enquiries.

## Optional

- [Cookie Policy](/cookie-policy): How the site uses cookies.
